title: CodeGrind AI Assistant boosts DSA practice with guided problem solving
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind’s Azure OpenAI assistant helps users tackle LeetCode-style problems with guided hints, multiple model options, and real-time feedback.
core_message: CodeGrind combines interactive coding with AI-assisted problem solving. Users can select the AI model, get step-by-step guidance, and see live feedback as they work through DSA challenges, all within the three-panel editor.
visual_brief: A concise 15–20 second spotlight video showing the CodeGrind editor UI: problem prompt on left, code editor center, AI chat on right. Include a quick AI-guided hint pop-up, a model-switch toggle, and a success checkmark animation when a solution passes. End with the CodeGrind logo and a CTA to try AI-assisted problems.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an AI Assistant for DSA practice. The three-panel editor showcases problem prompts, code editor, and AI chat with live feedback, custom model options, and guided hints. Experience step-by-step problem solving and instant feedback to accelerate learning. Try an AI-assisted challenge now at https://codegrind.online
